reasoning: Emotional (60%): Warm orange/yellow/white palette reads bright and friendly, not grim. Scattered particles convey energy without menace. However the explosion lacks the toy-diorama charm and round-friendly silhouette specificity expected for Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom — it reads as competent VFX rather than charming Hyrule magic. Score ~7/10. Technical (40%): Clean 1px hard outlines around central mass, 2-3 tone hard shading (white core → saturated orange mid → dark orange-brown edge), no visible AA, pixel-grid-snapped throughout, particles are individually hand-pixeled. Matches Denzi reference quality for hard-edge pixel construction. Score ~8/10. Combined: 0.6×7 + 0.4×8 = 7.4 → 7, marginal.
